name: Golden Minerals Co
business: Golden Minerals is an exploration company holding majority interests in the Desierto and Sarita Este concessions, adjoining gold-silver-copper exploration projects in Argentina, and a 60% interest in the Sand Canyon gold-silver project in Nevada. The company has divested its mining operations and currently has no source of revenue, focusing on advancing exploration activities and pursuing asset sales or external financing.

exposures.sentence: We are an exploration company holding or controlling majority interests in the Desierto and Sarita Este concessions, adjoining gold-silver-copper exploration projects located in northwest Salta Province Argentina.
